compiled_state.title: Harden Code Review Against LLM Agent Blindspots
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Context
Code review agents in the DSO pipeline lack checks for AI-specific failure modes identified by academic research (He et al. 2026; IEEE SDHD; Codium PR-Agent/Martian benchmark patterns). Debug sessions show LLM-behavioral failures dominate bug categories (18/20 in one session, 8/8 in another). Review agents miss domain mismatch (agents using generic patterns instead of internal utilities), spaghetti patching (trial-and-error fixes masking root causes), asymmetric changes (modifying interfaces without updating consumers), and UI artifacts (terminal output/merge markers in code). The AC library lacks gap-specific categories for security, architectural integrity, and pattern compliance.

## Success Criteria
- Code review agents include AI blindspot checks in existing reviewer delta files: (a) deep-hygiene adds domain mismatch detection (generic patterns vs internal utilities; hallucinated methods) and UI artifact detection (terminal output, merge markers, truncated blocks), (b) deep-correctness adds spaghetti patching detection (trial-and-error coding, band-aid conditionals) and asymmetric change detection (schema/interface modified without updating consumers), (c) deep-arch (opus) adds execution tracing with proof (mental trace with edge-case input; must NOT invoke tools), (d) standard adds condensed checks, (e) light adds UI artifacts only. All checks are supplementary annotations, not scoring dimensions.
- AC library includes 3 new category blocks: Security Boundary (user input/auth/data access; terminology aligned with security overlay), Architectural Integrity (interface/model modification; downstream consumer verification), Internal Pattern Compliance (low familiarity; prior-art search). All project-agnostic; ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md takes precedence.

## Scenario Analysis
- Execution tracing may cause opus to attempt tool invocations. Mitigated: explicit prohibition in delta text.
- AC library criteria may conflict with host project patterns. Mitigated: project-agnostic criteria with ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md precedence rule.
- Security Boundary AC may conflict with security overlay terminology. Mitigated: aligned terminology.
- Blindspot checks may distort tier classification. Mitigated: supplementary annotations, not scoring dimensions.

## Dependencies
None

## Approach
Integrate blindspot checks into existing reviewer delta files as supplementary annotations. Extend AC library with project-agnostic categories that defer to host project enforcement rules.

### Planning Intelligence Log

- **Web research (Step 2.6)**: not triggered
  - Bright-line conditions that fired: none (user-provided research: He et al. 2026, IEEE SDHD, EvalPlus/ACL, SWE-agent/Yang et al., Codium PR-Agent/Martian benchmark)

  - Scenarios surviving blue team filter: 5 (of 16 red team findings; 5 apply to this epic)
- **Practitioner-requested additional cycles**: none
- **Follow-on scrutiny (Step 0)**: triggered — depth: 0 (scope-split from combined spec)
- **Feasibility resolution (Step 2.5)**: not triggered
- **LLM-instruction signal (Step 5)**: triggered — keyword: agent definitions

comments.body:
## Implementation Plan Summary

7 tasks created under this epic (epic-direct mode — no intermediate stories):

| ID | Task | testing_mode | Status |
|----|------|--------------|--------|
| 77aa-0905 | Create RED test suite: test-reviewer-blindspot-annotations.sh | RED | open |
| ab01-e486 | Add AI Blindspot Annotations to deep-hygiene delta | UPDATE | open |
| 9b97-76ac | Add AI Blindspot Annotations to deep-correctness delta | UPDATE | open |
| 87f4-e93f | Add AI Blindspot Annotations to deep-arch delta | UPDATE | open |
| 267d-ec8e | Add condensed AI Blindspot Annotations to standard delta | UPDATE | open |
| 45c0-02f1 | Add AI Blindspot Annotations to light delta + remove RED markers | UPDATE | open |
| f99f-7a88 | Add AC library categories (Security Boundary, Arch Integrity, Pattern Compliance) | GREEN | open |

Dependency chain: 77aa-0905 → ab01-e486 → 9b97-76ac → 87f4-e93f → 267d-ec8e → 45c0-02f1 (serial); f99f-7a88 independent.

Plan review: 3 revision cycles; all critical/major findings resolved. Two minor findings incorporated directly (T1 RED marker exclusivity Verify, T6 SC1(e) commit message note).

Gap analysis findings applied as ticket comments on 77aa-0905 and 45c0-02f1.
comments.author: Test
